messages.content: {"2":"","UserId":"21eb2695-cd66-4fdc-8d57-72bf9a317f31","Status":"Analyzed","Type":"Lab Report","promptvalue":"You are a medical document classification assistant.  Analyze the uploaded file carefully and classify it into exactly ONE of the following categories:  - Lab reports - Wearables - Health records - Patient intake - Encounter notes  Instructions: - Read the full document content. - Determine the single best matching category. - Return ONLY the category name. - Do not provide explanations, confidence scores, JSON, formatting, or extra text. - Output must exactly match one of the category names above.","isfilesavevalue":"yes","":"","doumentupload":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584217227936359373Lab%20results%20M_Redacted.pdf","Notes":"","doumentupload_name":"Lab results M_Redacted.pdf","doumentupload_url":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584217227936359373Lab%20results%20M_Redacted.pdf","createdby":"f48287aa-f9e4-4810-8abd-5bd0123cc153","createddate":"2026-05-27T12:16:45.983Z","updatedby":"f48287aa-f9e4-4810-8abd-5bd0123cc153","updateddate":"2026-05-27T12:16:45.983Z","gocameomodel":"PatientDocument","id":"c1cb4ced-5917-4d55-b9ac-d7cfa4f19357","createdate":"2026-05-27T12:14:53.8034651+00:00","_rid":"xqw0APUgK5LSBQAAAAAAAA==","_self":"dbs/xqw0AA==/colls/xqw0APUgK5I=/docs/xqw0APUgK5LSBQAAAAAAAA==/","_etag":"\"09005312-0000-0700-0000-6a16e06a0000\"","_attachments":"attachments/","createdon":"2026-05-27T12:15:38.1941302Z","updatedon":"2026-05-27T12:15:38.1955514Z","_ts":1779884138,"aiagents":[],"highlightDataCard":[]}
